name: Pebble
story: Pebble's hobbies are finding the warmest square of pavement, sidewalk, or windowsill, and occupying it completely. She follows the sun around the house all day.
She's easy company — happy to be picked up, happy to be put down, happiest at whatever spot is 2 degrees warmer than everywhere else.
photoAlt: Pebble, a calico cat lying on warm pavement, looking up into the sun
